artPrompt: A vast government ledger room rendered vertically: two towering brass balance scales hang in deep shadow, each pan piled with blank illegible documents, a single coin suspended mid-air between them catching one shaft of cold light. Dust motes drift through the gloom; a faint arcane glimmer leaks from the smudged forms below. The composition climbs upward into darkness, lit by one harsh fluorescent source, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Balance the Budget to the Half-Cent
text:
Each player's life total is averaged with every other player's, then everyone is set to that average. If the average is not a whole number, leave the ½ unaccounted for and note it as a "rounding discrepancy" to be resolved never.
Then, the player with the most cards in hand must surrender exactly half of them, rounded toward the auditor.
flavorText: The books balanced perfectly. The half-cent that didn't has been missing for forty years.
